_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Conduct periodic data compliance assessments, documenting findings, evidence, risk ratings, and remediation assignments.
comments: NICE task intersects with WIDAI RC domain. Task RC-T-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-A-002 (RC, cosine: 0.531), RC-K-001 (RC, cosine: 0.518).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.1/10 (raw 0.411). Shared vocabulary: [compliance]. NICE-only terms [advise, stakeholders, vulnerability] vs WIDAI-only terms [assessments, assignments, conduct, data, documenting, evidence] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.879 (P=0.901, R=0.857). P exceeds R by 0.044 — the NICE element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 13 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Advise stakeholders on vulnerability compliance" and "Conduct periodic data compliance assessments, documenting findings, evidence, ri" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.536 > STS 0.411 (gap +0.125). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [compliance] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 5.9%. Shared tokens: [compliance]. NICE-only: [advise, stakeholders, vulnerability]. WIDAI-only: [assessments, assignments, conduct, data, documenting, evidence].
